title: The Vertex Commercial Tower
description: BIM Earth executed complete architectural, structural, and MEP coordination for this 62-story commercial skyscraper. Using point cloud scans and LOD 400 models, our team identified and resolved over 4,500 system clashes before construction began, resulting in a zero-delay structural phase.
highlight: Saved $1.2 Million in site-rework costs through virtual MEP optimization.
